problem.title: Symmetric Binary Tree Check
problem.description:
Problem Statement:
Check whether a given binary tree is symmetric around its center.

Input Format:
- First line contains integer N
- Second line contains level-order traversal (-1 indicates NULL)

Output Format:
- Print YES if symmetric, otherwise NO

Example:
Input:
7
1 2 2 3 4 4 3

Output:
YES

Explanation:
Left subtree is a mirror image of the right subtree.

solution.explanation: Check symmetry by recursive mirror comparison on array indices of a binary tree in level order, treating -1 as NULL.
